rationale: Review 2 flags the `simp [...]` (not `simp only`) inside the `fiberHomeomorph` subtype proof as brittle/nontrivial; acting on it yields only a more-explicit but equivalent proof whose change is stylistic/contested (maintainers differ on default simp-set use for membership goals closed by `map_proj`). Review 1's clean approval produces the identical merged artifact, so neither guidance improves the PR on proof-quality grounds.
